projects.description: A collection of digital banking and business ecosystem projects developed professionally for BCA through IT vendor Doubler.

items.title: BCA - Promo
items.description: A dynamic promotional website developed through Doubler for BCA, showcasing current offers and services with a focus on user engagement and conversion.
items.longDescription: Building a high-traffic promotional platform for Indonesia's largest private bank requires a focus on performance and accessibility. This project involved creating a modular system for managing various promotional banners and interactive elements.
challenges: Optimizing image delivery for mobile users.
Maintaining design consistency across complex promotional layouts.
solutions: Implemented Next.js Image optimization with custom loaders.
Developed a shared component library for UI consistency.

items.title: BCA - Ocean
items.description: A digital ecosystem developed through Doubler to connect businesses with BCA's banking, operational, and industry network.
items.longDescription: BCA Ocean is a complex B2B discovery platform. I worked on building the core interface that allows businesses to find and connect with relevant services within the BCA ecosystem.
challenges: Managing complex state across nested directory structures.
Ensuring fast load times despite heavy data visualization.
solutions: Utilized React Query for efficient data fetching and caching.
Implemented code splitting and lazy loading for heavy chart components.

items.title: BCA - Piala Presiden
items.description: A premier esports tournament website in Indonesia developed through Doubler for BCA, showcasing top-tier competitive gaming talent.
items.longDescription: An high-energy esports platform requiring real-time updates and interactive tournament brackets. I focused on the interactive presentation of scores and player profiles.
challenges: Synchronizing live data without page reloads.
solutions: Used CSS Grid and custom SVG logic for brackets.

items.title: BCA - Simulasi Obligasi
items.description: An interactive bond return simulator developed through Doubler for BCA's primary market, allowing users to calculate investment returns efficiently.
items.longDescription: A financial calculator tool that helps potential investors understand their returns. Precision and clear UI were paramount for this project.
challenges: Ensuring mathematical precision in JavaScript calculations.
solutions: Used Decimal.js for precise financial math.
Implemented Chart.js with custom responsive configurations.

items.title: BCA - Bangga Lokal
items.description: BCA's support program for MSMEs developed through Doubler, focusing on business development, promotion, and transaction ease.
items.longDescription: A marketplace-style platform dedicated to supporting local Indonesian businesses. I built the store discovery and promotional sections.
challenges: Handling large amounts of MSME data on a single page.
Creating an inviting, community-focused design UI.
solutions: Implemented virtualization for long lists of MSMEs.
Utilized custom SVG illustrations and soft UI patterns.

technology.title: Tools that keep your next launch smooth
technology.subtitle: You don’t need to learn the stack—just know that every choice here keeps your site fast, secure, and easy to update. These are the ingredients I rely on to ship dependable results.
